diseasePrediction.title: Crop Disease Predictor
diseasePrediction.subtitle: Upload a clear image of your crop leaf to detect possible diseases.
diseasePrediction.uploadPlaceholder: Click to upload or drag & drop
diseasePrediction.analyzingDesc: Our model is examining the crop image to detect diseases...
diseasePrediction.invalidMessage: Please Upload a Proper Plant Image
diseasePrediction.invalidDescription: The uploaded image doesn't appear to contain a clear view of a plant or crop leaf. For accurate disease detection, please ensure your image includes:

requirements.clearView: Clear view of plant leaves or crops
requirements.focusPlant: Focus on diseased or healthy plant parts

diseasePrediction.errorMessage: Failed to connect to the prediction service
diseasePrediction.errorRecommendation: Please ensure the API server is running on port 8001 and try again.
diseasePrediction.errorSolution: Check your internet connection and verify the backend server is running.

fertilizerPrediction.title: Fertilizer Prediction
fertilizerPrediction.subtitle: Get AI-powered fertilizer recommendations for your crops
fertilizerPrediction.districtPlaceholder: Enter your district or use location
fertilizerPrediction.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields (including district)
fertilizerPrediction.serverConnectionError: Cannot connect to server. Please make sure the backend server is running on port 8000.
fertilizerPrediction.serverError: Server error occurred. Please try again later.
fertilizerPrediction.weatherError: District name is required to fetch weather data
fertilizerPrediction.districtNotFound: District not found. Please check the district name.
fertilizerPrediction.humidityNotAvailable: Humidity data not available for this district
fertilizerPrediction.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser
fertilizerPrediction.districtNotDetermined: Could not determine district from your location
